economic_notes: First Nation operates a store enterprise, limited partnerships (SLFN Developments LP and Sturgeon Lake Property LP), cattle ranch with 118 animals (cows and bulls), agricultural operations, and government business enterprises. Treaty Land Entitlement revenue account maintained separately.
notes: Fiscal year is March 31, 2022, not 2024. Province is Saskatchewan (auditor address is Saskatoon, SK). 4 consolidated subsidiaries: Operations, CMHC Housing Fund, Store Enterprise, TLE Revenue Account. 3 GBEs under modified equity method: Sturgeon Lake Developments Ltd., Sturgeon Lake TLE Land Holding Corp., Sturgeon Lake Property Ltd. Two limited partnerships also under modified equity: SLFN Developments LP and Sturgeon Lake Property LP. Large assets under construction ($5.4M) and significant capital additions of $10.2M during year. Walton bonds held at cost with significant impairment risk noted. Contaminated site liability of $45,000. No schedule of remuneration found in provided text. Total government transfers calculated as ISC ($31,280,753) + PAGC ($761,764) + First Nations Trust ($492,955) + CMHC Subsidy ($467,346) + Ottawa Trust ($423,571) + SIIT ($404,474) + TLE Revenue Account ($388,715) + Northern Lights ($35,116) = $34,254,694 less deferral adjustments; OSR includes Store Sales, Other Revenue, LP Earnings, Rental Income, GBE earnings.
